meta.title: The Cat Who Saved the City

start.title: A Cat on the Rooftops
start.text: The city is in trouble, though nobody seems to notice. From the rooftop, I can see smoke near the tram station and hear a child crying below. I am only a cat, but I am also the only one who can move between all the hidden places.

tram.title: The Broken Tram
tram.text: A loose cable sparks above the tracks. If the tram moves now, it will derail. The driver is panicking. Someone needs to leap onto the control box and pull the emergency stop.

choices.text: Sprint across the rails and stop it
Call for people to clear the platform

fishmonger.title: A Deal for a Hero
fishmonger.text: The fishmonger listens, then nods. 'If you save the tram, the whole district will know your name,' they say, sliding over a paper bag like it is a sacred offering.

end.title: City Legend
end.text: By sunset, the city has a new hero, and it is a cat with dust on its paws and a perfectly timed leap.
